configurations.name: node-http-server
runtimeArgs: const path = require('path'), fs = require('fs'), http = require('http'); http.createServer((q,s) => { try { const url = new URL(q.url, `http://${q.headers.host}`).pathname; const normalized = path.normalize(decodeURI(url)).replace(/\\/g, '/'); if (normalized.startsWith('..') || !normalized.startsWith('/')) { s.writeHead(403); s.end('Forbidden'); return; } const file = path.join(__dirname, normalized === '/' ? '/index.html' : normalized); const rel = path.relative(__dirname, file); if (rel.startsWith('..')) { s.writeHead(403); s.end('Forbidden'); return; } fs.createReadStream(file).on('error', () => { s.writeHead(404); s.end('Not Found'); }).pipe(s); } catch (e) { s.writeHead(400); s.end('Bad Request'); } }).listen(3001)
